##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchaseSettle/importSettleOrder/single 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchaseSettle/importSettleOrder/single 
 ## 接口描述 
结算单单笔导入，用于客户在医招智付场景下，支持导入商品明细维度的结算单。结算单导入成功后返回单据编号。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"corporateCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%88%E4%B8%8B%E7%BA%BF%E4%B8%AD%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"0000","desc":"%20%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%B8%8B%E7%BA%BF%E4%B8%AD%E8%AF%B7%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billCompanyCode","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"Fx00001","desc":"%20%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depId","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1052","desc":"%20%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%92%8C%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%8F%AA%E9%9C%80%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billDepartmentCode","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%92%8C%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%8F%AA%E9%9C%80%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"eventSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"10866","desc":"%20%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%8E%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E7%9A%84%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E5%85%A5%E5%8F%82%E4%B8%AD%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%BC%A0%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD% 接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchaseSettle/importSettleOrder/single

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchaseSettle/importSettleOrder/single

接口描述

结算单单笔导入，用于客户在医招智付场景下，支持导入商品明细维度的结算单。结算单导入成功后返回单据编号。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON
